use_cases: Interactive background effect for landing pages and hero sections
Creative visual element for portfolios and creative tools
Engaging dashboard decoration for dev-tools and SaaS applications
Mouse-following animation effect for interactive presentations
Canvas-based decorative component for media and entertainment sites
ai_summary: An interactive canvas-based grid animation where lines dynamically respond to a mouse-following ball element. Built with framer-motion and React hooks, this component renders a configurable grid system with real-time mouse tracking. Supports theming via CSS variables and customizable grid parameters including columns, rows, spacing, and stroke styling. Perfect for creative interfaces, interactive backgrounds, or engaging visual effects in portfolios and landing pages.
